title: send_message
description: Post a message to a Slack channel or direct message. Supports plain text, markdown (mrkdwn), Block Kit blocks, and thread replies.

channel.description: Channel ID, channel name (e.g. '#general'), or user ID for DM

text.description: Message text (markdown supported). Used as fallback when blocks are provided.

blocks.description: Slack Block Kit blocks for rich message formatting

thread_ts.description: Timestamp of parent message to reply in thread

reply_broadcast.description: Also post threaded reply to the channel

as_user.description: Post as the authenticated user (vs. bot)
